title: polygala transcaucasica
intro: Polygala transcaucasica, also known as Caucasian milkwort, is a perennial plant species in the milkwort family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala transcaucasica are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and exhibit hepatoprotective effects. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia.
